---

## Summary

Describe the deferred security work in one short paragraph.

## Linked Context

- Related security exception issue:
- Related PR:
- Related commit or release:
- Related package, file, workflow area, or dependency:

## Why This Follow-Up Exists

Explain what was deferred and why it still needs explicit visibility.

## Current Mitigation Or Temporary Position

Describe any current mitigation, boundary, or reason the risk was considered temporarily tolerable.

## Ownership And Revisit Point

- Follow-up owner:
- Review or revisit by release, milestone, or date:
- Closure criteria:

## Trust And Sensitivity Check

- Trust-critical area affected: yes / no
- Affects auth, token, session, audit, backup, recovery, deployment, or secrets path: yes / no
- Should this remain routine follow-up or be escalated for stronger human review:

## AI Assistance Boundary

- AI or automation used to summarize context or prepare this issue: yes / no
- Human owner confirming follow-up path:

## Notes

Use this template when a security-related fix or review path is intentionally deferred after merge.
Do not use it to report a new suspected vulnerability publicly. For private disclosure, follow `SECURITY.md`.
